items.title: Hoola Health secures $5M funding led by Peak XV’s Surge
items.summary: Hoola Health said the new capital will be used to expand into new markets, strengthen its technology stack and scale its integrated care model.

items.title: Seattle is close to approving a year-long ban on large data centers
items.summary: The Seattle City Council has approved a moratorium on the construction of large data centers.
